title: Uber lays off 10 percent of its customer service team in favor of using AI - Engadget
summary: An Uber spokesperson told the publication that the cuts were done "to simplify operations, strengthen in-person collaboration and continue to embrace AI." The division affected by the layoffs is called Community Operations , Uber's global customer support network across its different businesses…
